Black Angus - 2290 WYOMING BLVD Food Establishment Class B Date: 04/07/2026 - #: CAC-Food-033193-2026 - Inspection Result: Unsatisfactory Re-Inspection required Bar has completed in person walk through of violation corrections by the environmental health department to be upgraded into unsatisfactory status. The facility has Corrected the following: Manual and Mechanical Warewashing Equipment, Chemical Sanitization Temperature, pH, Concentration and Hardness (quat sanitizer is in concentration) Handwashing Sinks, Installation, Water 85F (handwashing sink water temperature reaches 105°F) Common Name-Working Containers (quat sanitizer bucket is labeled) System Maintained in Good Repair, Repaired According to Law (drain has protective cover and is free flowing) Backflow Prevention, Air Gap (air gap repaired) Miscellaneous Sources of Contamination (drip cup installed) Unsatisfactory sticker was placed on front door Facility will be permitted to re-open under a Grade of Unsatisfactory and will be subject to a follow-up inspection within five (5) business days of reopening and operating. Previous inspection report with highlights of violations that still need to be followed up on was printed and provided to person in charge.
